item.title: Searchers uncover wreck of luxury steamer lost in Lake Michigan over 150 years ago
item.description: A search team has discovered the wreck of a luxury steamer that sank in a Lake Michigan gale more than 150 years ago

item.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
item.description: Lawmakers and the White House are offering no signs of compromise in their battle over oversight of federal immigration officers

item.title: Tax season is here. Here's what you need to know for stress-free filing
item.description: Tax season is underway and you have until April 15 to file your return with the IRS

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Saturday’s Powerball
item.description: The winning numbers in Saturday evening’s drawing of the "Powerball" game were: 23-43-58-60-64, Powerball: 24

item.title: Soaring coffee prices rewrite some Americans' daily routines
item.description: Rising coffee prices are changing how some Americans get their caffeine
